to define the geodetic height/altitude = height above sea level

parameters.name: AirRelHumidity

parameters.name: AirTemperature
parameters.description: Defines the air temperature. Which air temperature (inlet, room as average between inlet/outlet, room as LMTD) is defined, depends on the AirTemperatureMode.

parameters.name: AirTemperatureMode
parameters.description: Defines the input mode for the air temperature.

enums.description: to define the air inlet temperature.
to define the room temperature of the air as mean value between inlet and outlet
to define the room temperature of the air as LMTD, with room temperature (LMTD) = t_0 + LMTD (was only temporarily allowed for

parameters.name: BaseUnitID

parameters.name: CapacitySensibleHeatOnly
parameters.description: Additional flag for the thermal capacity, whether it defines only the sensible heat. Used only for America. Sensible heat refers to the thermal energy that is added to or removed from a system without a phase transition taking place. It is the heat that directly influences the temperature of a substance without changing its physical state. The formula ""Sensible heat = total power - heat of condensation"" shows how to calculate sensible heat by subtracting the total power of a system from the heat of condensation.

enums.description: ThermalCapacity defines the completely needed thermal capacity.
ThermalCapacity defines the sensible heat only.

parameters.name: FluidID
parameters.description: Defines the ID number of the fluid, that is used in the heat exchanger's main or first circuit.

parameters.name: FluidID_2
parameters.description: Defines the ID number of the fluid, that is used in the heat exchanger's second circuit when multiple circuits option is selected.

parameters.name: FluidInputMode
parameters.description: Defines the input modes for the fluid that says, which input values for the fluid must be set. This value is needed when ProductCategory is 3, 5 or 6 (air cooler for coolant, fluid cooler, sub cooler). For ProductCategory 6 (sub cooler), only FluidInputMode 0 is allowed.

enums.description: FluidTempInlet and FluidTempOutlet must be set
FluidTempInlet and FluidVolumeFlow must be set
FluidTempOutlet and FluidVolumeFlow must be set
FluidTempInlet and FluidPressureDropMax must be set
FluidTempOutlet and FluidPressureDropMax must be set
FluidTempInlet and FluidMassFlow must be set
FluidTempOutlet and FluidMassFlow must be set

parameters.name: FluidMassFlow
parameters.description: Defines the mass flow of the fluid. This value is needed, when FluidInputMode is 5 (FluidTempInlet and FluidMassFlow) or 6 (FluidTempOutlet and FluidVolumeFlow)

parameters.name: FluidPressure
parameters.description: Defines the pressure of the fluid. This value is needed for ProductCategory 0 (DX evaporator) or 10 (gas cooler).

parameters.name: FluidPressureDropMax
parameters.description: Defines the maximum allowed pressure drop of the fluid inside the heat exchanger. This value is considered for ProductCategory 3, 5 or 6 (air cooler for coolant, fluid cooler, sub cooler). For other product categories a valid value will be set internally. For other product categories a valid value will be set internally.

parameters.name: FluidPumpMode
parameters.description: Defines, how the fluid is pumped through the flooded evaporator. Depending on the mode, different internal limit values are set, in particular the maximum pressure drop in the fluid. This value is needed for ProductCategory 1 (flooded evaporator).

enums.description: Fluid circulation by a pump
Fluid circulation by gravity or natural circulation

parameters.name: FluidPumpRate
parameters.description: Defines how often a fluid part must pass through the evaporator until it is completely evaporated. This value is needed for ProductCategory 1 (flooded evaporator).

parameters.name: FluidSubCooling
parameters.description: Subcooling of the fluid after condensation. Specification relative to the condensation temperature at the end of the condensation process. Note: If the fluid has a temperature glide or a pressure loss occurs during condensation, the condensation temperature at the end of the condensation process is lower than FluidTempCond. If ProductCategory = 3 (condenser), a fixed subcooling of 1 K is assumed internally. Rule: The resulting subcooling temperature must not be lower than the evaporation temperature.

parameters.name: FluidSuperHeating
parameters.description: Superheating of the fluid after evaporation. Specification relative to the evaporation temperature FluidTempEvap.

parameters.name: FluidTempCond
parameters.description: Fluid condensation temperature at the inlet or in the middle of the first fluid circuit.

parameters.name: FluidTempCond_2
parameters.description: Fluid condensation temperature at the inlet or in the middle of the second fluid circuit.

parameters.name: FluidTempEvap
parameters.description: Fluid evaporation temperature at the inlet or in the middle. The dew popublic int must be specified for fluids with temperature glide.

parameters.name: FluidTempInlet
parameters.description: Fluid temperature at inlet of the first circuit. If ProductCategory = 2, 4 or 5 (refrigerant air cooler, dry cooler, subcooler) and FluidInputMode = 0 or 1. If ProductCategory = 3 (condenser), the following must apply: Hot gas temperature >= condensing temperature. Specifies the hot gas temperature for condensers. Rule: The following must apply: FluidTempInlet >= -40.0 °C if it is used (FluidInputMode = 0 or 1).

parameters.name: FluidTempInlet_2
parameters.description: Fluid temperature at inlet of the second circuit. If ProductCategory = 2, 4 or 5 (refrigerant air cooler, dry cooler, subcooler) and FluidInputMode = 0 or 1. If ProductCategory = 3 (condenser), the following must apply: Hot gas temperature >= condensing temperature. Specifies the hot gas temperature for condensers. Rule: The following must apply: FluidTempInlet >= -40.0 °C if it is used (FluidInputMode = 0 or 1).

parameters.name: FluidTempOutlet
parameters.description: Fluid temperature at outlet. Rule for ProductCategory = 3 = refrigerant air cooler: The following must apply: FluidTempOutlet > FluidTempInlet if both are specified (FluidInputMode = 0). Rule for ProductCategory = 5/6 = drycooler/subcooler:The following must apply: FluidTempOutlet < FluidTempInlet,if both are specified (FluidInputMode = 0). Rule: The following must apply: FluidTempOutlet >= -40.0 °C if it is used (FluidInputMode = 0 or 2).

parameters.name: FluidVolConcentration
parameters.description: Concentration of the fluid in volume-%. Only relevant if fluid allows a fluid concentration specification.

parameters.name: FluidVolumeFlow
parameters.description: Volume flow of the fluid. Only relevant if FluidInputMode = 1 or 2.

parameters.name: ForEnergySavingController
parameters.description: For energy-saving applications, if a switch cabinet or terminal box is selected.

parameters.name: ForNoiseUse
parameters.description: For noise-sensitive applications, if a switch cabinet or terminal box is selected.

parameters.name: FrostedCoil
parameters.description: Flag for frost on the block with 0.01 in as the default value for the frost thickness. Only in GPC.AM!

parameters.name: FrostThickness
parameters.description: Thickness of the frost layer to be considered in meters. Values greater than 0.0 are only permissible for evaporators and air coolers.

parameters.description: Indicates whether a full coverage double tray with insulation is required as an accessory.

enums.description: Indicates that the full coverage double tray with insulation is not necessarily needed.
Indicates that the full coverage double tray with insulation is definitely needed.

parameters.description: Defines the maximum air temperature from the selected location. Only relevant if HydroPad is selected.

Indicates that the streamer is definitely needed.

parameters.name: HBLKValve
parameters.description: Indicates whether a HBLK valve is required as an accessory.

parameters.name: HeatingStrapsAtAirOutlet
parameters.description: Indicates whether el. heating straps (at air outlet) are required as an accessory.

parameters.name: HingedFanPlate
parameters.description: Indicates whether hinged fan plates are required as an option.

parameters.name: HotGasInterConnectingTubing
parameters.description: Indicates whether hot gas interconnecting tubing is required as an accessory.

enums.description: with check value
without check value

parameters.name: HydroPad
parameters.description: Indicates whether hydroBLU is required as an accessory.

enums.description: hydroBLU is required as an accessory

parameters.name: InletHood
parameters.description: Indicates whether an inlet hood is required as an accessory.

parameters.name: InletNippleOuterDiameter
parameters.description: Defines the diameter of nipple(s) at the inlet.

parameters.name: InletPosLeft
parameters.description: Indicates whether connections in air flow direction left is required as an option.

parameters.name: InletPosRight
parameters.description: Indicates whether connections in air flow direction right is required as an option.

parameters.name: InletStateByTempAndPressure
parameters.description: Only relevant for CX evaporators! Normally, the pressure is calculated via the condensation temperature and subcooling. However, if you are in the supercritical range, this flag must be set! The inlet temperature and pressure must then be specified.

parameters.name: InputModeCapacity
parameters.description: Capacity calculation mode

enums.description: The capacity is fixed, the area reserve is adapted to the capacity.
The specified capacity is a target value, the actual capacity is optimized individually for each device or coil.
The capacity is fixed indirectly via the air-side specifications; the area reserve is adapted to the capacity. Only possible for coils.
The capacity is fixed, the condensing temperature is adapted to the capacity. Only possible for condenser coils.

parameters.name: InspectionCover
parameters.description: Indicates whether an inspection cover is required as an accessory.

parameters.name: IoTModule
parameters.description: Indicates whether an aicore link (IoT-Module) is required as an accessory.

parameters.name: IsAirRelHumidityAuto
parameters.description: Flag, if the relative air humidity at the inlet should be set automatically. Only available in GPC.AM.

parameters.name: IsContainerTransport
parameters.description: Transport from the unit in a container.

enums.description: Indicates no transport preference.
Indicates that the device is to be transported in a container.

parameters.name: IsHotGasAuto
parameters.description: Flag, if hot gas temperature should be set automatically. Only relevant for condensers.

parameters.name: IsMaxFluidPressureDropAuto
parameters.description: Flag, if max. fluid pressure drop should be set automatically.

parameters.name: isSubcritic
parameters.description: Subcritical CO2 gas coolers operate below the critical point of carbon dioxide, where CO2 exists in a two-phase state as both a liquid and a gas. In these systems, CO2 gas is condensed into a liquid state through heat exchange with a cooler medium, such as air or water. This process relies on the properties of CO2 as it undergoes phase change, transitioning from a gas to a liquid.

enums.description: Indicates that the unit will not operate in subcritical mode.
Indicates that the unit will operate in subcritical mode.

parameters.name: IsSubcriticMaxFluidPressureDropAuto
parameters.description: The max fluid pressre drop can be defined automatically.

enums.description: Indicates that the user must define the threshold.
Indicates that Güntner decides for a fitting value.

parameters.name: isSupercritic
parameters.description: Supercritical CO2 gas coolers, on the other hand, operate above the critical point of carbon dioxide. In this state, CO2 behaves as a supercritical fluid, exhibiting properties of both a gas and a liquid. These coolers utilize the unique properties of supercritical CO2 to achieve efficient heat transfer, particularly in applications where high pressures and temperatures are involved. The cooling process involves heat exchange to transition the supercritical CO2 fluid into a subcritical state, where it exhibits more conventional refrigeration behavior.

enums.description: Indicates that the unit will not operate in supercritical mode.
Indicates that the unit will operate in supercritical mode.

parameters.name: LastChangedKey
parameters.description: This parameter is not relevant for findunits but UI.

parameters.name: LocationID_HydroPad
parameters.description: The ID of the place to use for Hydropad calculation

parameters.name: LowEvapTempDesign
parameters.description: Indicates whether a the device must handle low temeratures.

parameters.name: ManualSpeedController
parameters.description: Indicates whether a manual speed controller is required as an accessory.

parameters.name: Market
parameters.description: Selects the market the device will be delivered to

enums.description: Europa (EU)
Asia, Pacific and Oceania (APO)
North and Latin America (NLA)

parameters.name: MaxNumberOfHits
parameters.description: Maximum number of results.

parameters.name: MaxOperatingPressure
parameters.description: Indicates the maximum fluid pressure of the device.

parameters.name: MaxSoundInputMode
parameters.description: Selects the mode the sound is filtered.

parameters.name: MaxSoundTolerance
parameters.description: Specifies how loud a unit may be.

parameters.name: MiniumRequiredSubcooling
parameters.description: If a subcooler is selected, how big is the temerature difference between the primary and secondard circuit.

parameters.name: MotorTechnology
parameters.description: This parameter defines the fan motor technology, or fan motor type of the unit.

enums.description: All fan motor technologies are considered
The fan motor technology is energy optimized
The fan motor technology is cost optimized
The motor technology is AC
The motor technology is EC (electronically commutated)

parameters.name: MountedAndWired
parameters.description: Specifies if the fans have to be mounted and wired or delivered seperately.

parameters.name: MountedLegs
parameters.description: Indicates whether legs will be attached to the device so it can stand. If not included, the device has to be mounted.

parameters.name: MountedLegsGS
parameters.description: When MountedLegs are included, these are in galvanized steel and therefore have no corrosion protection.

parameters.name: MountedLegsSS
parameters.description: When MountedLegs are included, these are made of stainless steel and therefore have a corrosion protection.

parameters.name: MultipleCircuits
parameters.description: Indicates if the device can have multiple circuits.

parameters.name: NippleTubeMaterial
parameters.description: Indicates whether a different material should be used for NippleTube

parameters.name: NoInletNipples
parameters.description: Defines the number of nipples at the inlet.

parameters.name: NoOfCircuitsThermo
parameters.description: Number of required thermo circuits.

parameters.name: NoOfDevices
parameters.description: Number of required units.

parameters.name: NoOfFans
parameters.description: Number of required fans.

parameters.name: NoOfPasses
parameters.description: Number of required passes.

parameters.name: NoOutletNipples
parameters.description: Defines the number of nipples at the outlet.

parameters.name: OnlyStockUnits
parameters.description: Only products that are ready to ship.

parameters.name: OutletNippleOuterDiameter
parameters.description: Defines the diameter of nipple(s) at the outlet.

parameters.name: OverpressureFlap
parameters.description: Indicates whether an OverpressureFlap is required as accessory.

parameters.name: PadTypes_HydroPad
parameters.description: Specifies Pad Type ID.

parameters.name: PassNumberConstraint
parameters.description: Constraints for the number of passes

enums.description: All numbers between nNumberOfPassesMin and nNumberOfPassesMax
Only even number of passes between nNumberOfPassesMin and nNumberOfPassesMax
Discrete values must be given in DiscreteNumberOfPasses

parameters.name: PowerSupply
parameters.description: Specification of the voltage supply network for which the unit should be suitable.

enums.description: no constraint

parameters.name: PreSelection
parameters.description: This parameter is not relevant for findunits but UI.

parameters.name: PressureSensor
parameters.description: Indicates whether a pressure sensor is required as an accessory.

parameters.name: PreviousChangedValue
parameters.description: This parameter is not relevant for findunits but UI.

parameters.name: ProductCategory
parameters.description: Defines the product category

enums.description: DX evaporator (Cold Indoor)
Flooded evaporator (Cold Indoor)
Gas Cooler
One phase air cooler (Cold Indoor)
Condenser (Warm Outdoor)
Brine cooler (Warm Outdoor)
Sub cooler (Warm Outdoor)
Oil cooler (Warm Outdoor)

parameters.name: RalNumber
parameters.description: Definer RAL number for special varnishing.

parameters.name: ReducedLegs
parameters.description: Indicates whether reduced legs are required as an accessory.

parameters.name: RepairSwitch
parameters.description: Indicates whether a repair switch is required as an accessory.

enums.description: No Repair switch
Repair switch selected

parameters.name: RepairSwitchPosition
parameters.description: Defines position of repair switch.

enums.description: Undefined
Mounted close to the fan
Mounted at the front
Standard

parameters.name: RepairSwitchType
parameters.description: Defines type of repair switch.

enums.description: Undefined
Two-turn (star/delta switchable) (9-pole)
Single-speed (7-pole)

parameters.name: RepairSwitchWiring
parameters.description: Defines wiring type for repair switch.

enums.description: Undefined
Preferably individually wired, i.e. one rep. switch per fan
Single wired, i.e. one rep. switch per fan
Preferably wired in pairs, i.e. two fans are switched with one rep. switch
Wired in pairs, i.e. two fans are switched with one repair switch
Preferably a single repair switch for all fans
A single repair switch for all fans

parameters.name: SeparationSheetWithHeater
parameters.description: Indicates whether a separation sheet with heater is required as an accessory.

parameters.name: Shutup
parameters.description: Indicates whether a defrost hose is required as an accessory.

parameters.name: SoundAbsorber
parameters.description: Indicates whether a sound absorber is required as an accessory.

parameters.name: SoundPressureDistance
parameters.description: Distance for which the sound pressure level is to be calculated [m]. Only relevant if - ProductCategory = 4 to 6 (condenser, drycooler or subcooler) - For ProductCatetory 1 to 3 (evaporator and refrigerant air cooler), this input parameter is ignored and set internally to 3 m - Distance specification according to enveloping surface method EN 13487, i.e. distance between appliance and the enveloping surface that is placed around the appliance. - Value range: >= 0 m

parameters.name: SoundPressureMax
parameters.description: Only relevant if - UnitSelectionMode = 0 ('unit search mode'). - The limit value applies to a distance corresponding to SoundPressureDistance. - The sound pressure level is calculated using the enveloping surface method in accordance with EN 13487. - If the sound pressure level is not to be limited, it is advisable to specify a high value(e.g. 99.0 dB(A)). In the selection program, the specified maximum sound pressure level is eventually increased internally by an additional 4 dB(A) tolerance.

enums.description: Max. sound power
Max. sound pressure

parameters.name: SpecialVarnishing
parameters.description: Indicates whether special varnishing is required as an option.

parameters.name: Subcooler
parameters.description: Indicates whether a subcooler is required as an option.

parameters.name: SubcriticAirRelHumidity
parameters.description: This parameter defines the subcritical air absolute humidity in %, for CO2 gas coolers.

parameters.name: SubcriticAirTemperature
parameters.description: This parameter defines the subcritical air dry bulb temperature in °C, for CO2 gas coolers.

parameters.name: SubcriticAirWetBulbTemp
parameters.description: This parameter defines the subcritical air wet bulb temperature in °C, for CO2 gas coolers.

parameters.name: SubcriticFluidPressureDropMax
parameters.description: This parameter defines the maximum allowable subcritical pressure drop in K for CO2 gas coolers.

parameters.name: SubcriticFluidTempCond
parameters.description: This parameter defines the subcritical condensing temperature in °C, for CO2 gas coolers

parameters.name: SubcriticFluidTempInlet
parameters.description: This parameter defines the subcritical inlet temperature, aka the hot gas temperature in °C, for CO2 gas coolers.

parameters.name: SubcriticIsHotGasAuto
parameters.description: This parameter defines whether the subcritical inlet temperature, aka hot gas temperature should be set automatically or set using the subcriticFluidTempInlet input.

enums.description: The subcritical inlet temperature is defined using the subcriticFluidTempInlet input
The subcritical inlet temperature is set automatically

parameters.name: SubcriticThermalCapacity
parameters.description: This parameter defines the target subcritical capacity in W for CO2 gas coolers.

parameters.name: SwitchCabinet
parameters.description: Indicates whether a switch cabinet is required as an accessory.

enums.description: Indicates that the switch cabinet is not necessarily needed.
Indicates that the switch cabinet is definitely needed.

parameters.name: SwitchCabinetAllocation
parameters.description: This parameter defines the allocation type for the switch cabinet. Either the allocation is automatically set, or it is set to one switch cabinet per unit.

enums.description: The allocation is automatic
There is one switch cabinet or terminal box allocated per unit
There is one switch cabinet or terminal box allocated per fluid circuit
There is no switch cabinet or terminal box selected

parameters.name: SwitchCabinetMotorTechnology
parameters.description: This parameter defines the fan motor technology, or fan motor type, for the switch cabinet.

enums.description: All fan motor technologies are considered
The fan motor technology is energy optimized
The fan motor technology is cost optimized
The motor technology is AC
The motor technology is EC (electronically commutated)

parameters.name: SwitchCabinetType
parameters.description: This parameter defines the type of the switch cabinet.

enums.description: Undefined
Consider all types
Switch cabinet with stand cabinet
Switch cabinet with terminal box
Switch cabinet with 0 to 10V terminal box
Modbus Daisy Chain
Set the switch cabinet automatically
Small switch cabinet
GIS-type switch cabinet
GWS-type switch cabinet
GSS-type switch cabinet
GKS-type switch cabinet
Switch cabinet with EC junction box
Switch cabinet with a panel

parameters.name: SwivelingFans
parameters.description: Indicates whether a swiveling fans, aka hinged fans, is required as an accessory.

enums.description: Indicates that the swiveling fans accessory is not necessarily needed.
Indicates that the swiveling fan plate accessory is definitely needed.
Indicates that the swiveling fans accessory is definitely needed.

parameters.name: TC_Tolerance_H
parameters.description: This parameters specifies the upper limit for the surface reserve tolerance.

parameters.name: TC_Tolerance_L
parameters.description: This parameters specifies the lower limit for the surface reserve tolerance.

parameters.name: TCondInputMode
parameters.description: This parameters defines the convention for defining where the condensing temperature of the input fluid is defined. This is required for refrigerants that have a significant temperature glide.. If the refrigerant considered doesn’t have a glide, then this parameter is not relevant.

enums.description: The input condensing temperature is defined at the fluid’s dew point, aka at the condenser’s inlet
The input condensing temperature is defined as a mean, at vapor quality of 0.5s inlet
The input condensing temperature is defined at the fluid’s bubble point, aka at the condenser’s outlet

parameters.name: TelescopicLegs
parameters.description: Indicates whether telescopic legs, are required as an accessory.

enums.description: Indicates that the telescopic legs accessory is not necessarily needed.
Indicates that the telescopic legs accessory is definitely needed.

parameters.name: TerminalBoxType
parameters.description: Defines the fan wiring type.

enums.description: AUTO
All fans grouped together to form a group.
Fans not grouped and individually connected.

parameters.name: ThermalCapacity
parameters.description: This parameters sets the target thermal capacity, in W, for the main circuit of the heat exchanger.

parameters.name: ThermalCapacity_2
parameters.description: This parameters sets the target thermal capacity, in W, for the secondary circuit of the heat exchanger.

parameters.name: ThermoContactType
parameters.description: This parameter defines the type of the thermo contact cabinet.

enums.description: Undefined
Consider all types
Set the thermo contact automatically
Set the thermo contact to manual reset
Set the thermo contact to remote reset

parameters.name: ThermosiphonOilCooling
parameters.description: Only available for NH3 condenser. This checkbox has an effect on the max. pressure drop in coil.

enums.description: AUTO max. pressure drop in coil equals 5.0 K.
AUTO max. pressure drop in coil equals 0.3 K.

parameters.name: ThreadConnectionMaterial
parameters.description: This parameter defines the material of the connection if a thread connection is selected as a connection type.

enums.description: Undefined
Set the thread connection material automatically
Consider all materials
Set the thread connection material to steel
Set the thread connection material to red brass
Set the thread connection material to stainless steel 304L
Set the thread connection material to stainless steel 316L

parameters.name: Tubing_Of_Integrated_Subcooler_With_Syphon
parameters.description: Indicates whether tubing of integrated subcooler with syphon required as an accessory (only if subcooler is already selected as an accessory)

enums.description: Indicates that the tubing of integrated subcooler with syphon accessory is not necessarily needed.
Indicates that the tubing of integrated subcooler with syphon accessory is definitely needed.

parameters.name: UnitFilterList
parameters.description: Specifies the filter a list of single units that should be calculated/validated.

parameters.name: UnitHeightMax
parameters.description: This parameters sets the maximum height in meters that should be considered for the units returned during a unit search.

parameters.name: UnitLengthMax
parameters.description: This parameters sets the maximum length in meters that should be considered for the units returned during a unit search.

enums.description: no constraint
high-strength copper (D)
stainl. steel (W)

parameters.name: UnitModelID_MRNameExternal
parameters.description: For recalculation (KDB): Model type name external.

parameters.name: UnitModelID_MRNameInternal
parameters.description: For recalculation (TDB): Model range name internal.

parameters.name: UnitModelID_MTNameExternal
parameters.description: For recalculation (TDB): Model type name external.

parameters.name: UnitModelID_MTNameInternal
parameters.description: For recalculation (TDB): Model type name internal.

parameters.name: Units
parameters.description: Specification of the model ranges.

parameters.name: UnitSelectionMode
parameters.description: Selection mode of the unit calculation.

enums.description: unit search
recalculation of a defined individual unit { get; set; } some other parameters are then ignored

parameters.name: UnitWidthMax
parameters.description: This parameters sets the maximum width in meters that should be considered for the units returned during a unit search.

parameters.name: UVC_Lamp
parameters.description: Indicates whether UVC lamp is required as an accessory,

enums.description: Indicates that the UVC lamp accessory is not necessarily needed.
Indicates that the UVC lamp accessory is definitely needed.

parameters.name: VersionNumber
parameters.description: Version number of the Guentner API

parameters.name: VibrationDampers
parameters.description: Indicates whether Vibration dampers are required as an accessory.

enums.description: Indicates that the Vibration dampers accessory is not necessarily needed.
Indicates that the Vibration dampers accessory is definitely needed.

parameters.name: WallSuspension
parameters.description: Indicates whether Wall suspension is required as an accessory.

enums.description: Indicates that the Wall suspension accessory is not necessarily needed.
Indicates that the Wall suspension accessory is definitely needed.

parameters.name: WaterConsumptionCalculation_HydroPad
parameters.description: The parameter defines whether or not a water consumption calculation is required to be perfumed for the unit selected, and output to the data sheet

enums.description: Indicates that the water consumption calculation should not be performed
Indicates that the water consumption calculation should be performed

parameters.name: WaterConsumptionCalculation_Mode_HydroPad
parameters.description: This parameter defines the way the water consumption calculation should be performed for units with the HydroSpray option, if the water calculation is requested.

enums.description: The wetting duration is set, and the switch point is then calculated (this is the default setting for the calculation mode)
The switch point is set, and the wetting duration is then calculated

parameters.name: WaterConsumptionCalculation_SwitchPoint_HydroPad
parameters.description: If the water calculation mode for a unit with a hydroSpray option is set to calculation of the wetting duration with a set switch point, this parameter sets the wetting duration to be used.

parameters.name: WaterConsumptionCalculation_WettingDuration_HydroPad
parameters.description: If the water calculation mode for a unit with a hydroSpray option is set to calculation of the switch point with a set wetting duration, this parameter sets the wetting duration to be used.

parameters.name: Watering_HydroPad
parameters.description: For a unit with the hydroBLU option selected, this parameter defines the opretation mode for the watering system:

enums.description: The unit is operating in wet mode, with pads installed and water fed to the pads
The unit is operating dry (no water fed for the pads), but with the pads installed on the unit
The unit is operating dry with the pads uninstalled on the unit

parameters.name: WateringRate_HydroPad
parameters.description: This parameter sets the watering rate for the hydroBLU system. The available values are 1.2, 1.6, 2.0 and 2.8 (default of 2.)

parameters.name: WeldingNeckFlangeNominalPressure
parameters.description: This parameters defines the nominal pressure rating for flanges (lapped flanges or welding neck flanges):

enums.description: PN16 B1 (DIN EN 1092-1) (only available for welding neck flanges)
PN40 B1 (DIN EN 1092-1) (only available for welding neck flanges)
PN40 D+C (DIN EN 1092-1) (only available for welding neck flanges)
PN10 (only available for lapped flanges, with brazing neck)

parameters.name: Wiring_To_Junction_Box_At_Side
parameters.description: Indicates whether Wiring to the terminal box is required as an accessory only for the old TDB series.

enums.description: Indicates that the Wiring to the terminal box accessory is not necessarily needed.
Indicates that the Wiring to the terminal box accessory is definitely needed.

parameters.name: Wiring_To_Terminal_Box
parameters.description: Indicates whether Wiring to the terminal box is required as an accessory for the newer KDB series.

enums.description: Indicates that the Wiring to the terminal box accessory is not necessarily needed.
Indicates that the Wiring to the terminal box accessory is definitely needed.
